title: DIMCP EP_35 DrinkCarrier was drunk af
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_35 DrinkCarrier was drunk af.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Dog is my co-pilot. We're taking some chipotle to somebody we don't know their name yet.
[00:00:06.32] Somebody we don't even know their name yet. It's a moonlit hour.
[00:00:11.68] This is my third shantuttle or chipotle delivery today, which I don't like because chipotle is one of the most basic things you could eat.
[00:00:22.00] In my opinion, restaurants you could order from?
[00:00:25.84] Yeah. Chipotle.
[00:00:27.84] Who even wants to order from?
[00:00:31.84] It's actually good, but like that's why everybody you answer the door for is embarrassed.
[00:00:37.28] Yeah.
[00:00:37.76] They're already embarrassed.
[00:00:39.68] Yeah.
[00:00:41.68] No way.
[00:00:44.16] I mean, what else does everybody say about it?
[00:00:45.68] Cudoba sucks too. They both...
[00:00:48.00] I don't like illegal pizza there.
[00:00:49.60] Yeah.
[00:00:50.56] I hate Chipotle.
[00:00:52.32] I hate Cudoba.
[00:00:54.48] I hate illegal pizza.
[00:00:56.24] That whole genre of food can fuck off in 2017.
